title: Dental & Oral Detection System
description: Final Year Project — an AI-powered health-tech system that detects multi-class oral diseases from images.
bullets: Built with PHP Laravel, MySQL, and deep learning (Keras/TensorFlow) to detect multi-class oral diseases from images.
Trains advanced image classification models for accurate diagnosis.
Full system workflow mapped via precise ERDs and architectural flowcharts.

title: Realtime Face Mask Detection
description: A real-time system that identifies whether a person is wearing a mask through a live video feed.
bullets: Built using computer vision and deep learning to detect mask-wearing in real time.
Designed to support public safety monitoring through a live video feed.

title: Tree Disease Prediction System
description: A deep learning model that identifies tree diseases from leaf images to support crop and forest management.
bullets: Built a Keras-based deep learning model to identify and predict tree diseases from leaf images.
Supports early detection and better crop and forest management decisions.

title: Kidney Stones Prediction System
description: A machine learning model that predicts kidney disease from patient medical data.
bullets: Developed using Keras to predict kidney disease based on patient medical data.
Helps in early detection by analyzing key health parameters and improving diagnostic accuracy.

title: Heart Disease Prediction System
description: A machine learning model that predicts heart disease risk from clinical and patient health data.
bullets: Developed using Keras to predict the risk of heart disease from clinical and patient health data.
Supports early diagnosis and better medical decision-making.

title: Diabetes & Breast Cancer Prediction System
description: Machine learning models that predict diabetes and breast cancer risk from patient medical data.
bullets: Developed using Keras to predict diabetes and breast cancer based on patient medical data.
Supports early detection and assists healthcare professionals in decision-making.

title: Spam Email Classification (NLP)
description: A model that detects spam vs. legitimate emails using natural language processing.
bullets: Built a model to classify emails as spam or not spam using Python, Google Colab, and NLP.
Used Naive Bayes for classification after text cleaning and preprocessing.
